headline: Netflix Price Hikes Could Unlock $1.7 Billion With Minimal Churn Risk
summary: Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) is drawing renewed attention from two of Wall Street’s largest institutions ahead of its April 16 Q1 earnings report. Citi and JPMorgan are both bullish, with the central thesis anchored in Netflix’s recently announced price increases and their potential to drive meaningful revenue upside with limited subscriber risk.
